data.title: Rolen Road Church of Christ launches website to better connect with Reynoldsburg, Etna, Pataskala, and Blacklick residents.
data.description: Rolen Road Church of Christ has recently introduced a revamped website to enhance communication with residents of Reynoldsburg, Etna, Pataskala, and Blacklick. Serving the Reynoldsburg community for numerous years, the church aims to raise visibility about its offerings. This initiative targets fostering improved outreach and engagement within the community.

data.title: NAMB praises Senator Warnock for introducing Appraisal Modernization Act, improving efficiency in real estate appraisals.
data.description: A new law is set to boost effectiveness, cut expenses, and elevate precision in the real estate appraisal process, benefiting lenders and borrowers alike. The legislation, introduced in Washington on July 17, 2025, will bring positive changes to the industry. The National Association of Mortgage Brokers (NAMB) supports these developments, marking a significant milestone in enhancing the appraisal system for all involved parties.

data.title: Edmond Town Hall in Newtown, CT, shifts to an entertainment & event hub as town offices relocate. Historic gem transforming.
data.description: In Newtown, Connecticut, on July 17, 2025, Edmond Town Hall, a prominent municipal center and community cinema, is undergoing a transformation. After the transfer of municipal offices to Fairfield Hills, this historic building is being repurposed.

data.title: AvevoRx signs deal for Alpha-1 drug distribution, expanding treatment options for emphysema patients.
data.description: AvevoRx, based in Greensboro, N.C., announced on July 17, 2025, that they have reached an agreement with a major global healthcare company. This partnership will enhance AvevoRx's range of treatment options for patients grappling with a genetic type of emphysema. AvevoRx is recognized as a prominent independent provider of specialty infusion pharmacy services on a national level. This collaboration is set to bolster the healthcare offerings to individuals suffering from this specific condition.

data.title: Infinity-AP grows customer base for retail store buildout services in US & international markets. #retailgrowth #expansion
data.description: Infinity-AP, a prominent company offering comprehensive retail store buildout services, revealed its substantial growth in the customer base within the United States and global markets. The announcement was made from WAVELAND, Miss., on July 17, 2025. This highlights the company's success in expanding its reach and serving a wider audience with their services.

data.title: Ohio 911 Centers in Chagrin Valley implement ASAO Service, reducing dispatcher workload with automated alarm notifications.
data.description: Recently, the Monitoring Association shared that three Emergency Communications Centers located in Chagrin Valley, Ohio, have adopted the Automated Secure Alarm Protocol (ASAP) Service. This innovative technology aims to simplify alarm notifications and enhance efficiency in emergency responses. By implementing ASAP, the ECCs aim to reduce dispatcher workload and automate the alarm notification process.

data.title: Salus GRC expands services for wealth managers and RIAs to enhance compliance and risk management amid complex regulations.
data.description: On July 17th, Salus GRC, a top provider of compliance and risk management solutions for wealth managers and RIAs, unveiled an expansion of its services to aid firms in confidently navigating intricate regulatory demands. This move comes as a response to the growing complexity in regulations faced by such firms.

data.title: Pennsylvania Certified Organic appoints Chris Solt as Executive Director. USDA-accredited certifier in Spring Mills, PA.
data.description: A prominent USDA-accredited organic certification agency, Pennsylvania Certified Organic (PCO), based in Spring Mills, Pennsylvania, has named Chris Solt as its new Executive Director. This announcement was made on July 17, 2025. PCO is known for its high standards in organic certification and plays a significant role in the industry.
Brazil's Cosan stated in filing that there is no agreement, commitment, or signed document related to a potential deal involving Moove.

data.title: PathoCare Holdings, Inc. accepts $500M tender offer, launches new equity round for product development.
data.description: In Houston, PathoCare Holdings, Inc., the parent company of PathoCare, LLC, a top non-invasive diagnostics provider, has created a series of tests supported by a cutting-edge testing system using Raman spectroscopy. This platform is fortified by 17 patents and advanced AI technology. Recently, the company disclosed its acceptance of a third-party offer for the acquisition of shares from an initial investor. The transaction involves the purchase of a significant number of shares from the early investor, although precise details were not provided in the announcement.
THE YIELD ON THE 10-YEAR JAPANESE GOVERNMENT BOND (JGB) REMAINS UNCHANGED AT 1.555%.

data.title: Aeris and Bridge Alliance partner to provide APAC enterprises with cellular IoT security solution; Aeris IoT Watchtower offers cyber risk visibility.
data.description: A collaboration has been formed between Aeris Communications, Inc., a prominent figure in secure cellular IoT platforms, and Bridge Alliance, a top alliance representing major mobile network operators across Asia-Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. This partnership aims to provide Aeris IoT Watchtower, a solution designed to offer comprehensive insight into the cyber risk of enterprise clients' IoT devices without the need for software installation. The alliance is set to deliver essential tools for mitigating or avoiding cybersecurity threats. This venture signifies a significant step forward in enhancing cybersecurity measures for IoT devices and is poised to benefit numerous enterprises across various regions.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor excels in earnings, leading stock lists. Check best stocks to buy & watch from IBD's updated lists.
data.description: Recently, updated lists of top-performing stocks by IBD have been released. Taiwan Semiconductor is among the stocks that were added to the list, reflecting its impressive earnings growth. Investors seeking the best stocks to buy and monitor can find valuable insights by exploring these lists, which feature notable additions and removals.

data.title: Myke Towers' new album "Island Boyz" features 23 tracks showcasing his Caribbean roots and creative vision.
data.description: In a significant creative transition, Myke Towers is introducing his latest project "Island Boyz" in Miami on July 18, 2025. This 23-track album encapsulates the artist's Caribbean roots with a unique perspective, aiming to defy conventional standards and establish its own distinct musical identity. The tracks seamlessly fuse reggaetón influences, offering a fresh take on the genre.

data.title: FDA authorizes marketing of JUUL tobacco, menthol e-cigarettes. Statement from Truth Initiative CEO.
data.description: Kathy Crosby, the CEO and President of Truth Initiative, released a statement on July 17, 2025, addressing the recent decision by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to approve the marketing of tobacco and menthol-flavored JUUL e-cigarette products. This decision highlights the necessity for ongoing efforts to regulate the vaping industry.
CANADA’S INTERNATIONAL TRADE MINISTER SAYS THERE IS STRONG MOMENTUM TO EXPEDITE TRADE NEGOTIATIONS WITH ASEAN NATIONS.
